
<!-- ::::{.columns}
:::{.column} -->
<!--  -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**High quality data in one place**


:::
:::{.ddm-box}

::::{.columns}
:::{.column}
- Stop wasting time cleaning messy data  
- Everything you need, already organized  
- Reliable numbers you can trust  
- Spend your time thinking, not fixing data  
:::
:::{.column}
![](figs/dalmash/graph.png){width=300 fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
:::
::::

<!--  -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**Fundamental analysis**

:::
:::{.ddm-box}
- See which companies are doing well (and which aren’t) instantly  
- Compare companies side by side  
- Understand growth, profits, and performance quickly  
- Turn data into clear investment ideas  
:::
::::

<!--  -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**Technical analysis**

:::
:::{.ddm-box}

::::{.columns}
:::{.column}
- Spot trends in prices easily  
- See when things are going up, down, or sideways  
- Understand market behavior at a glance  
- Explore ideas without complicated setup   
:::
:::{.column}
![](figs/dalmash/exchange.png){width=550 fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
:::
::::


<!--  -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**Manage portfolios**

:::
:::{.ddm-box}

::::{.columns}
:::{.column}
- Keep all your investments in one place  
- Track performance at a glance  
- See what’s working and what’s not  
- Compare different portfolios easily  
- Stay organized as your investments grow   
:::
:::{.column}
![](figs/dalmash/portfolio.png){width=300 fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
:::
::::

<!-- :::
:::{.column} -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**Zoom in/zoom out**

:::
:::{.ddm-box}

::::{.columns}
:::{.column}
- Look at the big picture or small details anytime  
- Switch from sectors to individual companies instantly  
- Stay flexible as your questions change   
:::
:::{.column}
![](figs/dalmash/zoom.png){width=300 fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
:::
::::

<!--  -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**Visualization tools**
:::
:::{.ddm-box}
- Turn data into simple, clear charts  
- Compare companies visually  
- Understand complex data in seconds  
- Share insights easily  
:::
::::

<!--  -->
::::{.ddm}
:::{.ddm-head onclick="toggleBox(this)" style="text-align:left"}
**Get your own AI/ML based insights or use ours**

:::
:::{.ddm-box}

::::{.columns}
:::{.column}
- Discover patterns you might miss  
- Get smarter insights from your data  
- Let the system do the heavy thinking  
- Make better decisions with less effort  
- Get alerts on unusual changes  
- Spot opportunities earlier  
- Understand risks more clearly  
- Turn information into action  
:::
:::{.column}
![](figs/dalmash/analysis.png){width=600 fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
:::
::::

<!-- :::
:::: -->
